title: Submit Invalid Login
goal: Submit invalid credentials on the login page and stop on the error message.
instruction: Enter invalid credentials, submit the form, and stop when the login error appears.
review_notes: Uses an intentionally invalid login to create a deterministic feedback state without hidden credentials.

steps.explanation: I entered an invalid username as part of the login attempt.
I entered an invalid password to trigger the error state safely.
I submitted the invalid credentials. The page should now show a login error message.

action.summary: I submitted invalid credentials and stopped when the login error appeared.

steps.explanation: The login error is visible now, so I am ending the task.
